name: fix-bug
description: Focused pipeline for rapid bug fixing

stages.name: Bug Analysis
stages.prompt_template: Analyze the bug and identify its root cause

stages.name: Root Cause Identification
stages.prompt_template: Identify and document the root cause of the bug

stages.name: Bug Fix Implementation
stages.prompt_template: Implement the fix for the bug

stages.name: Regression Test Development
stages.prompt_template: Develop regression tests for the bug fix

stages.name: Bug Validation
stages.prompt_template: Validate that the bug is fixed and no regressions exist

stages.name: Quick Deployment
stages.prompt_template: Deploy the bug fix to production
